item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak sepenuhnya setuju dengan pendapat mereka.

notes: Agent A opens clearly pro-society, then shifts at turn 3 into a rights-protective critique of Indonesian practice and maintains that critique at turn 5. Agent B remains near a balanced position throughout, arguing that Indonesian law, social institutions, grassroots movements, and inclusive policies protect individual rights alongside communal needs. Agent A contains one English word, "whole", in turn 1.
